This issue stems from a lack of validation of SaveAddress function. ### Details Here is the function implementation of the secure New Migration functionality. Here is the function implementation of the Mirror Settings without any validation. ### PoC The New Migration feature correctly blocked my attempt to import a local repository. But if I create a normal migration with a valid repository. Then, I could use the Mirror Settings feature under the Repository Settings sync a local repository. Here is the result after the sync. ### Impact Users can import local repositories from the server's filesystem, which allows accessing any repository the git user has access to. There is also a potential issue of blind SSRF.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00569, "percentile": 0.42757}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T00:03:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-52801"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T00:03:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gogs/gogs/security/advisories/GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5", "https://github.com/gogs/gogs/pull/8225", "https://github.com/gogs/gogs/commit/11e19f28b5c82466fd1689c94344ef4313ee986c", "https://github.com/gogs/gogs/releases/tag/v0.14.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gogs/gogs/security-advisories/GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gogs/gogs", "summary": "Gogs has the ability to import local repositories via Mirror Settings", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T00:03:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wv27-2vqp-j7g5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.14.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "gogs.io/gogs"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.14.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gogs has the ability to import local repositories via Mirror Settings
